item.title: [Segurança] CISA Warns of Zimbra, SharePoint Flaw Exploits; Cisco Zero-Day Hit in Ransomware Attacks
item.description:
🚨 CISA Warns of Zimbra, SharePoint Flaw Exploits; Cisco Zero-Day Hit in Ransomware Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has urged government agencies to apply patches for two security flaws impacting Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) and Microsoft Office SharePoint, stating they have been actively exploited in the wild. The vulnerabilities in question are as follows - CVE-2025-66376 (CVSS score: 7.2) - A stored cross-site scripting
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/cisa-warns-of-zimbra-sharepoint-flaw.html

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root - Qualys
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root - Qualys
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-3888 associada a Qualys. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-4268 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-4268 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The WP Go Maps (formerly WP Google Maps) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the ‘wpgmza_custom_js’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 10.0.05 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping and missing capability check in the 'admin_post_wpgmza_save_settings' hook anonymous function. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level ac...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4268

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8108-1: Bouncy Castle vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8108-1: Bouncy Castle vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 6.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that Bouncy Castle did not sanitize user input when inserting it into an LDAP search filter. An attacker could possibly use this issue to perform an LDAP injection attack. This issue only affected Ubuntu 16.04 LTS, Ubuntu 18.04 LTS, Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, and Ubuntu 22.04 LTS. (CVE-2023-33201) It was discovered that Bouncy Castle incorrectly handled specially crafted F2m parameters in the ECCurve algorit...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8108-1

item.title: [Segurança] CISA orders feds to patch Zimbra XSS flaw exploited in attacks
item.description:
💣 CISA orders feds to patch Zimbra XSS flaw exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government agencies to secure their servers against an actively exploited vulnerability in the Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS).
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-zimbra-xss-flaw-exploited-in-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] Critical Microsoft SharePoint flaw now exploited in attacks
item.description:
💣 Critical Microsoft SharePoint flaw now exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical Microsoft SharePoint vulnerability patched in January is now being exploited in attacks, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) warned.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/critical-microsoft-sharepoint-flaw-now-exploited-in-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] Cisco Firewall Vulnerability Exploited as Zero-Day in Interlock Ransomware Attacks
item.description:
💣 Cisco Firewall Vulnerability Exploited as Zero-Day in Interlock Ransomware Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: SecurityWeek
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Amazon found evidence that the FMC software vulnerability has been exploited since late January, and found links to Russia.
Link: https://www.securityweek.com/cisco-firewall-vulnerability-exploited-as-zero-day-in-interlock-ransomware-attacks/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Former Premier League manager, 78, teams up with Robin van Persie at Feyenoord in an advisory role just weeks after quitting World Cup job to care for his sick daughter - Daily Mail
item.description:
📢 Former Premier League manager, 78, teams up with Robin van Persie at Feyenoord in an advisory role just weeks after quitting World Cup job to care for his sick daughter - Daily Mail
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a Office, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
